transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Reyes Auto Repair, this is Sofía's assistant. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment for a brake job. My brakes have been squealing and I think the pads need replacing.

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: I'd love to help with that! Sofía specializes in brake service, especially on older and high-mileage vehicles. When were you hoping to bring it in?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Sometime this week? Wednesday or Thursday would be ideal.

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Let me check the schedule... Wednesday at 2pm or Thursday at 10am are both open. Which works better for you?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Wednesday at 2 is perfect.

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Great! I have you down for Wednesday at 2pm for a brake pad replacement. Can I get your name?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Rachel. Rachel Kim.

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Wonderful, Rachel. Just so you know, brake pad replacements usually take about one to two hours depending on the vehicle. Sofía will do an inspection at the start to check the rotors and calipers too. Should I send a confirmation text to this number?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Yes please! And can you tell her it's a 2019 Honda Civic? The front brakes are the ones making noise.

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Absolutely, I'll note that — 2019 Honda Civic, front brake pads. Sofía knows those well. Anything else I can help with?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: No, that's it. Thank you so much!

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: You're welcome, Rachel! See you Wednesday at 2. Have a wonderful day!

voice_calls.outcome: Voicemail — asked about walk-in oil change

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Reyes Auto Repair, this is Sofía's assistant. How can I help you?

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Thank you for calling! We're appointment-only right now but I can help you find a time. I'll have Sofía call you back today. Have a great day!

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Reyes Auto Repair, this is Sofía's assistant. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: That's a great idea. I'll note that as a priority item and have Sofía look at it first. She usually recommends addressing brake issues before anything else for safety.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: You're the best. Thank you!

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: You're so welcome! We can't wait for July 18th. Have a great day, Adriana!

transcript.text: Reyes Auto Repair, this is Sofía's assistant. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: caller

transcript.speaker: ai

transcript.speaker: ai
transcript.text: Reyes Auto Repair, this is Sofía's assistant. How can I help you?

transcript.speaker: caller

transcript.speaker: ai

instagram_threads.name: Amber M.
instagram_threads.outcome: Booked Saturday 2pm — pre-road-trip inspection for niece's car

messages.text: hi! is there any way I can book for next Saturday for an inspection? my niece is driving to LA for the first time 🫶
Hi Amber! Yes — Saturday at 11am or 2pm both open for a pre-road-trip inspection. I'll save the 2pm for your niece if that works. So exciting for her first big drive!
omg that was so fast! yes 2pm please. her name is Maya
Done! Maya is booked for Saturday at 2pm. What kind of car is she driving? Sofía loves doing thorough pre-trip checks!
she has a 2015 Honda Fit. it's got like 80K miles on it. should we be worried about anything?

At 80K miles, Sofía will definitely check the brakes, tires, coolant, belts, and fluids. Honda Fits are super reliable but it's smart to catch anything before a long drive. She'll do a full multi-point inspection.
perfect!! can she also top off the fluids and check the AC? Maya's AC has been weak
Yes! Sofía can check the AC refrigerant levels and top off all fluids as part of the inspection. I'd budget about 1.5 hours total for inspection + AC check. Sound good?
sounds amazing. how much will it be?
For the full pre-trip inspection plus AC check and fluid top-off, it'll be around $150-$180. There's no deposit needed — just bring the car in Saturday at 2!
perfect! Maya is SO relieved to know the car will be checked before her trip. see you Saturday!! 💕
Hi Sofía! We're an auto blog based in SF and we'd love to feature your shop. We saw the fleet maintenance photos and they're IMPRESSIVE. Would you be open to a quick interview + photo feature?

Hi! Thank you so much for reaching out — Sofía would be thrilled! She's incredibly passionate about quality auto repair and honest service. Let me check her schedule and get back to you with some times for the interview. Can you share more about the feature format?

It would be a 30-min Zoom interview + we'd use 6-8 of her shop and project photos (with client permission). The feature goes to our 12K email subscribers and 8K Instagram followers. We don't charge anything — it's editorial!
That sounds wonderful! I've shared the details with Sofía and she's very interested. She'll reach out this week to schedule the Zoom. Thanks for thinking of Reyes Auto Repair!

instagram_threads.name: Chloe Mendez
instagram_threads.outcome: Fleet service tentatively booked Aug 10, awaiting confirmation

messages.text: Hi! We run a delivery company and need someone for our fleet (6 vans). Do you do fleet service?

Hi Chloe! Yes, Sofía does fleet service for delivery and commercial vehicles. For 6 vans she'd start early — around 7-8am — to make sure everything is done by end of day. What kind of service do you need?
Oil changes, brake inspections, and tire rotations on all 6. That's why I specifically want Sofía — everyone says she's thorough and honest
That's exactly what Sofía is known for! Her fleet maintenance package for 6 vehicles is $1,400 including a full multi-point inspection on each. Want to set up a service day in August?
yes!! August works. maybe around the 10th?
August 10th looks open! I'll pencil that in for the fleet service. It's a full day — Sofía will work through all 6 vans systematically. $200 deposit to hold the date.
perfect! can you send me a booking link or should I just come by?
I'll send you a booking link with the deposit details! $200 deposit to hold Aug 10 for the fleet service. Let me know if you have any questions — Sofía is excited to take care of your fleet!
hey sofía! love your page. do you have any openings for an oil change this week?
Hi Natalia! Thank you! I have Thursday at 2pm or Saturday at 10am open for an oil change. Which works better?
Thursday at 2! how much is an oil change?

Standard oil changes start at $65 for conventional oil. If you want synthetic, that's $95 and includes a filter replacement. Sofía always does a quick multi-point check while the car is up on the lift.
ooh the synthetic sounds good for my car. let's do $95. book me in!
You're all set! Thursday at 2pm — synthetic oil change + multi-point check ($95). See you then, Natalia! 💫

instagram_threads.name: Luisa Fernandez
instagram_threads.outcome: Quoted $800 for 4 vehicles, service date TBD

messages.text: Hola Sofía! Mi familia tiene 4 carros y todos necesitan servicio antes del verano. ¿Pueden hacer los 4 el mismo dia?
¡Hola Luisa! Que buena idea hacerlos todos juntos! Para 4 carros, lo ideal es dejarlos temprano en la mañana. ¿Les queda bien el 2 de agosto? El paquete para 4 vehiculos es $800.
perfecto! y que incluye el paquete?
Incluye cambio de aceite, rotacion de llantas, inspeccion de frenos, y revision de fluidos en cada carro. Sofía hace una inspeccion completa de todo.
que bueno. y necesitan deposito?
Si, un deposito de $200 para reservar la fecha. Se puede pagar por Zelle o en persona. ¿Le mando los datos?
si por favor! le voy a comentar a mi esposo y te confirmo esta semana 🙏

instagram_threads.name: Jenny Park
instagram_threads.outcome: Sent transmission repair info, awaiting response

messages.text: Hi! My car has been making a weird grinding noise when shifting gears. Looking for someone trustworthy. You do transmission work right?
Hi Jenny! Yes, transmission repair is one of Sofía's specialties — she's done hundreds of transmission jobs over the past ten years. What kind of car do you have?
it's a 2016 Mazda 3 with about 95K miles. how much would a diagnostic cost?
For a transmission diagnostic, it's $120 — that includes a full scan, fluid check, and test drive. Sofía will give you an honest assessment and a repair estimate before doing any work.
that sounds really reasonable. let me check my schedule and I'll get back to you this week!
my check engine light keeps coming on and off. should I be worried? I don't want to get ripped off somewhere

Hi Marisol! That's a common concern — an intermittent check engine light can be anything from a loose gas cap to a sensor issue. Sofía uses professional-grade diagnostic tools to pinpoint the exact problem. Want to book a diagnostic appointment?
yes! what days do you have open?
Next Wednesday at 11am or Friday at 4pm are open for a diagnostic ($85 — includes full OBD-II scan and visual inspection). Sofía will explain exactly what's going on. Which day works?
do you take walk-ins? I'm in the mission rn and my car is making a weird noise
Hey Tay! We're appointment-only but I actually have a spot today at 3pm if that works? Let me know and I'll save it for you!
ugh 3 is too late I have to be somewhere. maybe next week?
Sofía! My car has been stalling randomly and this morning it wouldn't start at all. Your reviews are AMAZING. Please tell me you can help!

Hi Diana! I'm sorry about the car trouble! Sofía would love to take a look — that sounds like it could be a starter, alternator, or battery issue. For a full diagnostic, how about June 7 or June 14? She'll find the root cause.
June 14 works! It's a 2014 Nissan Altima and I've been having electrical issues for months. I just want someone honest who won't upsell me on stuff I don't need

Sofía is known for honest diagnostics — she'll only recommend what's truly needed. Nissan electrical issues are something she sees regularly. June 14 is penciled in! The diagnostic is $95. $50 deposit to lock it in.
can my dad come too? he wants to understand what's wrong with the car
Of course! Sofía always takes time to explain everything so you and your dad understand exactly what's going on. I'll block extra time so there's no rush. Sending the deposit link now!
Hi! We love your fleet maintenance post from April. Can we repost with credit to @reyesautorepair? We have 22K followers focused on SF auto shops and mechanics.
Hi! Thank you so much! Sofía would be honored. Yes, please feel free to repost with credit to @reyesautorepair. Would you also be able to tag the shop location?
Absolutely! We'll tag both the account and the location. Posting tomorrow morning. Thank you! 🙌

instagram_threads.name: Maria Santos
instagram_threads.outcome: Hybrid service advice given, booked appointment

messages.text: Sofía! I just got a Toyota Prius hybrid and I have no idea how to maintain it. Do you work on hybrids?

Hi Maria! Yes, Sofía works on hybrids! For a Prius, maintenance is actually simpler than you'd think: 1) Regular oil changes every 5K miles with synthetic, 2) Brake inspection — hybrids use regenerative braking so pads last longer, 3) Coolant system check — hybrids have two coolant loops. The battery rarely needs service before 150K miles!
omg thank you!! this is so helpful. do you do a first-time hybrid owner inspection?

Sofía does a comprehensive hybrid health check for $110. She'll go through the battery system, regenerative brakes, both coolant loops, and all the standard maintenance items. She'll also set up a maintenance schedule for you!
ok I want to come in for the hybrid check! when's the next opening?

instagram_threads.name: Mission District Life
instagram_threads.outcome: Photo walk scheduled for next week

messages.text: Hey Sofía! We're doing a "Women of Mission Street" photo series for our page (45K followers). Would Reyes Auto Repair be interested in being featured?
Hi! What an amazing project! Sofía has been on Mission Street for 10 years and would love to be part of this. When are you shooting?
We're flexible! Ideally a weekday morning when the shop has good light. We'd do a 20-min photo walk of the shop + a quick Q&A about her journey.
That sounds perfect. Tuesday or Wednesday mornings have the best light in the shop. Sofía is available next Tuesday at 9:30am before her first appointment. Does that work?
Sofi! Los camiones de la Galleria quedaron perfectos. Tengo 3 clientes mas este verano — julio, agosto, y septiembre. Quieres ser nuestra mecanica oficial?
¡Hola Rosa! Que honor! Sofía encantada de ser la mecanica oficial de SF Fleet Solutions. ¿Cuantos vehiculos por contrato? Le paso las fechas para ver disponibilidad.
Julio 26 (5 vehiculos), agosto 16 (4 vehiculos), septiembre 6 (6 vehiculos). Mismos precios que la ultima vez?

Las tres fechas estan abiertas! Para paquete de verano con SF Fleet Solutions: $200/vehiculo (incluye inspeccion completa). Julio: $1,000, agosto: $800, sept: $1,200. Total: $3,000. ¿Le parece bien? Puedo hacer descuento del 10% por los tres contratos juntos.
el 10% descuento me encanta! o sea $2,700 por los tres? perfecto. te mando deposito esta semana
Exacto, $2,700 total con deposito de $800 para reservar las tres fechas. Le mando los datos de Zelle. ¡Va a ser un verano increible! 🔧

instagram_threads.name: Elena Gutierrez
instagram_threads.outcome: Booked diagnostic, referred by Bianca R.

messages.text: Hi Sofía! My friend Bianca R. told me you're amazing with cars. I have a 2013 VW Jetta that keeps overheating and I've never found a mechanic I trust. Do you have availability?

Hi Elena! We love Bianca — she's wonderful! Sofía has extensive experience with VW cooling systems and would be glad to take a look. Would you like to start with a diagnostic? They're $85 and take about 45 minutes.
yes please! I'm free most afternoons
How about next Wednesday at 3pm? Sofía will run a full diagnostic, check the cooling system, and give you an honest assessment. Bring any maintenance records you have!
HELP my brakes started grinding today and I have a road trip Saturday. my regular mechanic is booked solid 😭 do you have ANYTHING available Friday or Saturday morning??
Oh no! Don't worry — let me check. I have Friday at 4pm open. Sofía can do a brake inspection and pad replacement in about 90 minutes. Would that work?
YES PLEASE. it's a 2020 Honda CR-V and the grinding is really loud, especially when braking downhill

That sounds like the pads are worn down to the metal — Sofía will check the rotors too to make sure they're not damaged. Honda CR-V brake jobs are straightforward for her. $180-$220 for pads and rotor resurfacing if needed. Want me to book it?
BOOKED. you literally saved my road trip. see you tomorrow at 4!! 🙏🙏🙏

copilot_sessions.question: Pop, what should I do first today?
copilot_sessions.answer: Three things, Sofía. First — Diego needs an answer by Friday or he takes another offer; my read is yes, hire him. Second — you had twenty-seven DMs this morning; I replied to twenty-four and booked eleven of them already. Third — I held back three fleet service inquiries because they need your voice, not mine. And by the way, I sent the friendly nudge to Adriana for the invoice. She just paid.

contextSources.detail: Today's schedule: Maritza's Camry 10am, Isabella's Corolla 1:30pm
Open commitments: 5 pending, Diego deadline Friday

copilot_sessions.question: How much revenue am I losing from unanswered DMs?
copilot_sessions.answer: Based on the last 30 days: you had 83 DMs that mentioned booking. Of those, 27 went unanswered for more than 24 hours. Industry data says 60% of unanswered booking DMs go to competitors. At your average ticket of $185, that's roughly $2,997 in potential lost revenue this month alone. The three fleet inquiries you missed last month were worth $3,200 combined. Good news: since I started handling DMs two days ago, response time is under 30 seconds and zero have gone unanswered.

contextSources.detail: 83 booking-related DMs in last 30 days analyzed
3 reviews mention slow DM response as complaint

copilot_sessions.question: Should I hire Diego? Give me the pros and cons.
copilot_sessions.answer: Pros: Diego has 8 years of experience as a mechanic and is ASE-certified. He's bilingual. He interviewed well — you liked his work ethic. Your busiest months are June through September and you're already turning away vehicles. With Diego, you could take 12 more jobs per week, which at $185 average is $2,220/week in new revenue. Cons: Payroll adds roughly $4,000/month. You're also considering the second bay lease at $1,800/month. Together that's $5,800 in new fixed costs. But your current wait-list has 30+ vehicles, and you lost 3 fleet contracts last month from slow replies. My recommendation: hire Diego. The revenue upside far outweighs the cost, especially heading into summer when cars break down more.

contextSources.detail: 3 calls from potential clients turned away this week

copilot_sessions.question: Draft a response to that bad Yelp review from Stephanie K.
copilot_sessions.answer:
Here's what I'd suggest:

"Hi Stephanie — thank you so much for the kind words about the brake work! I'm really sorry about the scheduling experience. You're absolutely right that our wait times have been longer than they should be, and the mix-up with the appointment book is on us. We're implementing a new booking system right now to make sure this never happens again. I'd love to make it right — next time you come in, your multi-point inspection is on me. Just mention this review. Thank you for giving us a chance to improve. — Sofía"

This acknowledges the issue, doesn't make excuses, offers a specific make-good, and shows you're fixing the root cause. Want me to post it, or do you want to edit first?

contextSources.detail: DM response history: avg 18hr before Pop

copilot_sessions.question: What's my schedule look like this week?
copilot_sessions.answer:
Here's your week, Sofía:

Tuesday (today): Maritza's Camry at 10am (oil change + brake check), then open afternoon — I blocked 2pm-3pm for you to review the 3 fleet DM responses I drafted.

Wednesday: Full day — 4 vehicles back to back, 8am to 5pm. I moved your parts order reminder to Thursday so you're not stressed.

Thursday: Lighter day — 2 vehicles morning, then Diego's trial day starts at 11am. This is important — watch how he handles the transmission diagnostic.

Friday: 3 vehicles, then Daniela Vega diagnostic at 3pm (new client, found us by phone).

Saturday: Walk-through at 2693 Mission at 2pm with Patricia (second bay lease). I prepped a cost analysis for you.

Biggest thing to watch: Diego needs an answer by Friday. And the 3 fleet DMs are time-sensitive — fleet managers book fast.

contextSources.detail: Diego follow-up email flagged as deadline Friday
Daniela Vega diagnostic from phone booking

copilot_sessions.question: Can I afford the second bay lease? Be honest.
copilot_sessions.answer:
Let me run the numbers honestly.

Current: $42K/month revenue, roughly $24K after parts, rent, and payroll for 3 staff. That leaves about $18K margin.

The lease is $1,800/month. If you also hire Diego ($4,000/month), you're adding $5,800 in fixed costs. New margin: $12,200.

BUT — with an extra lift bay and Diego, you could service 12 more vehicles/week. At $185 average, that's $8,880/month in new revenue. Net gain: roughly $3,080/month even in the worst case.

Summer heat (June-Sept) will push that much higher — AC repairs and overheating issues spike. You have 30+ vehicles on a wait-list right now.

My honest take: you can afford it, but do them in sequence. Hire Diego first (May), see how June goes, then sign the lease for July 1. That de-risks it. Patricia said the unit is available June 1, but I bet you can negotiate a July start.

contextSources.detail: 3 turn-away calls this week, wait-list growing

copilot_sessions.question: Help me respond to Isabella's car repair inquiry. She emailed in English but her mom just called in Spanish. I want to reply warmly in both.
copilot_sessions.answer:
I'll draft both:

Email to Isabella (English):
"Hi Isabella! I took a look at the details about your 2018 Corolla overheating — that's definitely something we want to address quickly before it causes engine damage. I specialize in Toyota diagnostics and would love to help. I have Thursday or Friday open this week for a diagnostic. Your mom Carmen called today and she was so sweet — she said you were really impressed by our work on a friend's car. That made my day! Let's get your Corolla running perfectly again. — Sofía"

Text to Carmen (Spanish):
"Hola Carmen! Fue un placer hablar contigo hoy. Le acabo de mandar un email a Isabella con todos los detalles. Voy a cuidar bien su carrito — no se preocupe. Gracias por pensar en nosotras. Un abrazo, Sofía"

Want me to send both?

contextSources.detail: Carmen Cruz call — 4m 12s, took car details
Thursday, Friday open for diagnostic slots

copilot_sessions.question: What are my competitors doing on Instagram that I'm not?
copilot_sessions.answer:
I looked at 5 auto repair shops within 3 miles of you:

1. Posting frequency: They average 4-5 posts/week. You've posted 0 in 11 days. The algorithm rewards consistency — your reach has dropped 40% in the last month.

2. Before/after reels: 3 of 5 competitors post transformation reels showing rusted brakes vs. new pads, dirty vs. clean engines. Those get 3-5x more engagement than static photos. You haven't posted a reel in 6 weeks.

3. Booking links in bio: All 5 competitors have a direct booking link in their Instagram bio. You don't have online booking at all — your bio just says "DM to book" but DMs go unanswered.

4. Review responses: 4 of 5 respond to every Google/Yelp review within 48 hours. You have 7 unanswered reviews.

The good news: your work is genuinely better than theirs. Your problem isn't quality — it's visibility and responsiveness. I can auto-post your repair transformation photos if you take them. Want me to set that up?
